{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201733238E886ABBB57D51475883"}"},"total":912},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7462779348258603800","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，和别的历史小说不一样，从不同角度去解读，虽然进度慢，但写的很详细，很符合我这种不喜欢看历史书人的胃口","text_exts":[{"e":12,"s":8,"text":"历史小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399920351475883%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227462779348258603800%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227417059579546045465%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737569350,"group_id":"7417059579546045465","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N31wC2ShEOMPeim3C68Znfc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110967038006","user_name":"雄心勃勃的龙瞳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110967038006","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7417059579546045465","book_info":{"abstract":"【功是功，错是错，辩证去看待问题，人民价值观，非传统天幕文。】
“在你们心里，帝王将相的丰功伟业和千万百姓的生命哪一个更加重要？”
“如果让你当皇帝，你要如何解决文官集团，世家门阀。”
“五代十国到底乱成什么样子了，赵匡胤真的是靠杯酒释兵权解决武将吗？”
“吃饭，喝酒，赏赐就能解决肆意的武将吗？”
“如果你穿越回古代，想要发动一场政变，亦或者造反，需要准备什么才能成功。”
“从普通人的视线去看，迷人的老祖宗真的好吗？”
“多数史书为什么会自相矛盾？让人读起来很假，仿佛一眼就可以看出史书在造假。”
“如果你真的穿越回古代，你认为你能活几天。”
“扶苏造反，真的能拯救大秦？秦朝的兵权制度决定了扶苏必死。”
“天授皇权真的如字面意思一样，天授予皇帝权力？”
“神权到底如何被打倒，真的是商纣王打倒神权吗？”
“盛世之下的普通人过的好不好吗？”

ount":0,"listen_duration":7230,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8486,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8462},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7459720392782414654","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小说很不错，比起同类型的其他天幕文，这本有逻辑有深度，不是各种无脑吹皇帝。我印象中最深刻的是作者讲到赵匡胤的时候，我看到了新的视角下的赵匡胤，我之前看别的天幕文，大多数说到赵匡胤只会说他重文轻武，杯酒释兵权，从而导致了宋朝后面的衰弱。而这本小说却解释了他为什么要重文轻武，让我重新认识了赵匡胤，小说中他从一个模糊的历史人物变成了一个有血有肉的人，很值得一看","text_exts":[{"e":53,"s":50,"text":"赵匡胤","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399920351475883%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227459720392782414654%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227417059579546045465%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736856349,"group_id":"7417059579546045465","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/oyiyA4I+FZXGby+M3gTAU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"708500135613571","user_name":"lilith^"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"708500135613571","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7417059579546045465","book_info":{"abstract":"【功是功，错是错，辩证去看待问题，人民价值观，非传统天幕文。】
